description_long: This object is a medium-sized apple with a predominantly deep red skin, accented by subtle yellow-green hues near the stem. The surface is smooth and slightly glossy, with a natural, organic curvature typical of fresh apples. The top of the apple features a shallow dimple where the stem would be, though the stem itself is not visible. There are several irregularities and missing patches on the lower half, exposing a rougher, lighter interior texture. The apple appears to be resting on a plain, slightly reflective surface, with some debris or fragments scattered around its base. The overall form is round but slightly asymmetrical, with visible signs of surface damage and missing sections.
description: A deep red apple with yellow-green near the top, smooth and glossy, with visible surface damage and missing patches.
description_view_0: Front view shows a mostly intact red apple with a yellow-green top and a smooth, rounded surface.
description_view_1: This side reveals more missing patches and rough, exposed interior textures on the lower right.
description_view_2: Back view displays the most extensive surface damage, with large missing sections and rough, uneven edges.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the apple's asymmetry and additional missing patches on the left side.
attribute_visible_damage_or_blemishes: large missing patches and rough exposed areas
